windows.publisher_config: release-local only; set THESEUS_WINDOWS_SIGNING_CERT_THUMBPRINT or THESEUS_WINDOWS_SIGNING_CERT_PATH; do not commit private signing material

install_contract: verify CUDA on NVIDIA hosts and MLX on supported hosts
create or reuse Project Theseus venv
install user-level autostart service only after explicit user action
macos_install_contract: copy payload from USB/source checkout into ~/Library/Application Support/Project Theseus Hive/app/current
create user-visible apps in /Applications when writable, otherwise ~/Applications
store mutable reports/checkpoints/build outputs under Application Support and Caches
create or reuse .venv-puffer under the installed payload
install numpy and MLX on Apple Silicon when dependency bootstrap is enabled
emit a DMG and installer artifact manifest on a Mac builder
apply invite JSON and optional coordinator/relay URLs
run Hive probe and scheduler after install
hive_version_convergence_contract: nodes check the private /api/hive/update-catalog endpoint at startup and on a timer
nodes auto-install soft metadata updates only
hard source/app replacement requires a verified package or explicit hard-update flow
installer artifacts are advertised through reports/hive_installer_artifacts.json and private Hive artifact sync
macos_usb_bundle_contract: build from Windows, macOS, or Linux through scripts/hive_usb_writer.py without following reports/checkpoints/target junctions
exclude virtualenvs, local caches, generated runtime outputs, large ROM/game files, and local secret configs
normalize shell scripts and launchers to LF line endings
embed an invite for the active local Hive token unless an explicit invite is supplied
include a double-click .command launcher, .app wrapper, CLI fallback, manifest, and zip with executable modes
universal_usb_bundle_contract: one payload is shared by Windows, macOS, and Linux installers
setup wizard and CLI can list removable drives before writing
USB writes require selected target confirmation by label or explicit yes flag
Windows launcher copies payload to %LOCALAPPDATA% before installing and starting Hive
macOS launcher copies payload to ~/Library/Application Support before installing and starting Hive
Linux launcher copies payload to ~/.local/share before installing and starting Hive
embedded invite uses the active Hive id and join token by default
new Hive mode creates a fresh local Hive credential set and can activate it on the coordinator
public worker mode configures public contribution without embedding a private Hive token
root launchers and autorun metadata are included, while acknowledging that modern OSes require a user gesture
Windows installers create a user-session tray operator and Start Menu shortcuts by default unless -NoTray is requested
Windows tray surfaces report-aware notifications for training improvement, blocked actions, teacher-needed states, and promotion readiness
Windows release signing is wired through Authenticode/signtool and local-only certificate environment variables
bundle can be written from the setup wizard or the theseus usb write CLI command
